source_pr.title: plan: add push topn optimizing.
source_pr.body:
we push topn firstly to remove the `limit` property from `required property`.
@shenli @coocood @zimulala PTAL

symptoms: sql: "select a, count(b) from t group by b order by c limit 5", (plan/logical_plan_test.go)
failure_signature: sql: "select a, count(b) from t group by b order by c limit 5", (plan/logical_plan_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: sql: "select a, count(b) from t group by b order by c limit 5", (plan/logical_plan_test.go)
